nodes.name: Webhook Trigger – CSV Upload
nodes.notes: Accepts multipart POST with CSV file. Endpoint: POST /webhook/upload-invoice

nodes.name: Google Drive Trigger – Folder Watch
nodes.notes: BONUS: Monitors a Google Drive folder for new CSV files. Set GDRIVE_FOLDER_ID in environment variables.

nodes.name: Download File from Drive
nodes.notes: Downloads the CSV file binary from Google Drive for processing.

nodes.name: Generate SHA-256 Hash
nodes.notes: Computes SHA-256 of the file contents for idempotency. Prevents reprocessing the same file.

nodes.name: Parse CSV to JSON
nodes.notes: Parses the binary CSV into JSON rows. Expected headers: supplier_number, supplier_name, invoice_number, department, invoice_date, amount_excl, vat_rate (optional), vat (optional), amount_incl (optional)

nodes.name: Validate & Normalise Rows
nodes.notes: Enforces all business rules: required fields, VAT math (±0.01), SA 15% VAT default, future date check. Returns valid=true/false with detailed validation_notes.

nodes.name: Route: Valid vs Failed
nodes.notes: Splits flow: valid records proceed to dedup check; invalid records are marked as 'failed' and collected for the email summary.

parameters.query: SELECT 1 FROM supplier_invoices WHERE supplier_number = '{{$json.supplier_number}}' AND invoice_number = '{{$json.invoice_number}}' LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: Check Duplicate in DB
nodes.notes: Queries supplier_invoices for existing (supplier_number, invoice_number) pair. Returns a row if duplicate exists.

nodes.name: Route: New vs Duplicate
nodes.notes: If DB query returned 0 rows → record is new (proceed to insert). If 1 row returned → mark as duplicate, skip insert.

nodes.name: Insert Valid Invoice
nodes.notes: Inserts normalised, validated, non-duplicate invoice into supplier_invoices with status='inserted'.

nodes.name: Mark as Duplicate
nodes.notes: Tags duplicate records with status='duplicate'. These are collected and reported in the email summary but not inserted.

nodes.name: Mark as Failed
nodes.notes: Tags validation-failed records with status='failed'. Includes validation_notes from the validation step.

nodes.name: Aggregate Metrics
nodes.notes: Combines results from all branches. Counts inserted, duplicates, failed. Builds error table (max 20 rows) for the email alert.

parameters.subject: Supplier Ingest: {{$json.inserted}} ok, {{$json.duplicates}} dup, {{$json.failed}} failed
parameters.message:
=

Supplier Invoice Ingest Summary

Processed {{$json.processed}}
✅ Inserted {{$json.inserted}}
⚠️ Duplicates {{$json.duplicates}}
❌ Failed {{$json.failed}}
{{#if $json.errors.length}}

Issues ({{$json.errors.length}} rows)

{{#each $json.errors}} {{/each}}
Invoice # Supplier # Reason
{{this.invoice_number}} {{this.supplier_number}} {{this.reason}}
{{/if}}

Generated by n8n Supplier Invoice Ingest Workflow – Africa/Johannesburg timezone

nodes.name: Send Email Summary
nodes.notes: Sends HTML email summary. Subject contains live counts. Body has metrics table + error table (max 20 rows). Configure ALERT_EMAIL env var.

parameters.responseBody: ={"status": "accepted", "message": "Invoice file received and is being processed.", "file": "{{$('Generate SHA-256 Hash').first().json.source_file_name}}"}

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns immediate JSON acknowledgement to the webhook caller so they don't wait for full processing.
